title: Ancient Warrior Persona
scenario: Design an ancient warrior persona for a historical reenactment. The persona should have a rich and detailed backstory, with a clear motivation for fighting. The persona should also have a unique set of skills and abilities, with a detailed description of their combat techniques and tactics. The output should be in the format of a character sheet, with multiple sections and subsections.
constraints: Must include at least 3 unique abilities
Must describe at least 2 different combat techniques

evaluationCriteria.description: How accurately and compellingly is the persona's backstory described?
How well do the persona's skills align with their role and goals?
How accurately and creatively are the combat techniques described?
